summary: Tested heading-up rotation precision fix. All key changes verified: 1) Heading-up formula is purely -currentHeading (no manualRotation offset), 2) manualRotation resets to 0 when entering heading-up mode, 3) Touch rotation blocked in heading-up mode, 4) Smoothing factor increased to 0.45/0.6. Route to Vail works with all sign types.

integration_issues.issue: ReferenceError: remainingMiles is not defined - occurs during navigation state updates

action_items: Fix ReferenceError: remainingMiles is not defined in NavigationView.tsx (appears in console during navigation)
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Line 4199-4202 - Heading-up mode rotation is purely -currentHeading (no manualRotation offset)
VERIFIED: Line 313-316 - handleToggleNorthUp resets manualRotation to 0 when entering heading-up mode
VERIFIED: Line 360-376 - Touch rotation handlers only active when isNorthUp is true (blocked in heading-up)
VERIFIED: Line 4186 - Smoothing factor increased to 0.6 for route navigation, 0.45 otherwise
VERIFIED: index.css line 29 - map rotation CSS var (--map-rotation) used by container
BUG FOUND: Console error 'ReferenceError: remainingMiles is not defined' during navigation updates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Heading-up rotation fix verified. Key test results: 1) Initial heading-up state: nav_north_up=false, rotation=-54.19deg, 2) After North-up toggle: nav_north_up=true, rotation=0deg, 3) After Heading-up toggle: nav_north_up=false, rotation=-90.33deg. Route to Vail produces 27 shields, 3 exits, 5 speed limits, 10 CMV warnings. Minor bug: 'remainingMiles is not defined' error in console during navigation.

heading_up_rotation_formula.details: Line 4201: totalRotation = -currentHeading (no manualRotation offset). Verified rotation values: -54.19deg, -90.33deg

manual_rotation_reset_on_heading_up_entr.details: Line 315-316: setManualRotation(0) and manualRotationRef.current = 0 when entering heading-up mode

touch_rotation_blocked_in_heading_up.details: Line 361, 371: Touch handlers check 'isNorthUp' before allowing rotation - blocked when isNorthUp=false (heading-up)

north_up_mode_allows_manual_rotation.details: Line 4203-4206: North-up mode applies manualRotationRef.current to rotation

smoothing_factor_increased.details: Line 4186: factor = 0.6 when driving with route, 0.45 otherwise (increased from 0.35)

route_calculation_works.details: Route from Council Bluffs to Vail: 638.4 mi, 9h 9m

highway_shield_markers.details: 27 highway shield markers placed on route

exit_sign_markers.details: 3 exit sign markers placed on route

speed_limit_sign_markers.details: 5 speed limit sign markers placed on route

cmv_warning_markers.details: 10 CMV warning markers placed on route

orientation_toggle_button.details: data-testid='orientation-btn' toggles between heading-up and north-up modes correctly

vehicle_marker_rotation.details: Vehicle marker uses --vehicle-rotation CSS var set to currentHeading

console_error_found.suggested_fix: Ensure remainingMiles is defined before being used in forEach loops for restriction/traffic/CMV alerts
